about.intro: I'm Rabin R — a Frontend Angular Developer from Chennai with 3.7+ years of professional experience building scalable enterprise web and mobile applications. I specialize in Angular (v13–v20), TypeScript, RxJS, Angular Signals, Ionic, and Tailwind CSS.
bio: I've engineered enterprise systems used by 10,000+ active users, optimized application performance by 50%, and reduced API consumption by 40% through smart caching and RxJS stream optimization. My expertise spans government portals (Fiji Immigration Department), enterprise pension management systems (PRIMS), and cross-platform mobile apps (Vanuatu National Provident Fund).

I thrive in Agile/Scrum teams and specialize in clean, reusable component architecture, performance optimization, secure API integration with JWT authentication and RBAC, and delivering production-grade SPAs. I'm an immediate joiner open to remote, hybrid, or full-time roles.

experience.title: A track record of delivering enterprise-grade applications
experience.subtitle: From government immigration platforms to large-scale pension management systems, here is where my craft has been forged.

achievements: Developed enterprise Angular applications (v13–v20) for government and business platforms
Built scalable Single Page Applications (SPA) used by 10,000+ daily active users
Engineered 4 distinct government portals with role-based access control (RBAC) and JWT authentication
Improved application performance by 50% using Angular Signals and OnPush change detection
Reduced API consumption by 40% through smart caching and RxJS stream optimization
Constructed complex multi-step forms, enterprise validation modules, and workflow systems
Built and published reusable Angular component libraries adopted across all portals
Worked in Agile/Scrum enterprise environments with global stakeholders
Integrated REST APIs, Web Services, and backend systems across 5+ enterprise platforms
Optimized UI performance and frontend scalability for large-scale government usage

skills.title: Full-stack capability with deep Angular expertise
skills.subtitle: Comprehensive skill set across frontend technologies, mobile development, API integration, and enterprise architecture.

projects.title: Selected work — enterprise, government & mobile
projects.subtitle: A peek at recent products I've helped design, engineer, and ship. Each one balances scalable architecture with refined UI.

featured.name: Fiji Immigration Department Portal
featured.description: Enterprise immigration management platform developed for government workflows including external user portals, internal staff portals, police verification systems, and secure payment gateway integration.
featured.highlights: Multi-step enterprise workflow systems, Secure authentication & RBAC, Responsive government portal UI, High-performance Angular architecture, REST API integration.

caseStudy.problem: The Fiji Immigration Department relied on outdated paper-based workflows and fragmented legacy systems, causing processing delays of 3–5 business days per application. Staff had no unified digital view of applicant status, resulting in manual follow-ups and high error rates.
caseStudy.approach: Built a multi-portal Angular 21 SPA with role-based access control — separate portals for external applicants, internal immigration officers, and police verification units. Used Angular Signals for real-time UI state and integrated a secure payment gateway for permit fees.
challenges: Complex multi-role RBAC with 6 distinct user types across 3 separate portal UIs
Integrating legacy government APIs with inconsistent data formats
Ensuring WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance for a government system

grid.alt: PRIMS — Pension & Retirement Information Management System
grid.name: PRIMS — Pension & Retirement Information Management System
grid.description: High-performance pension and retirement dashboard system designed for enterprise administration and scalable data workflows.
grid.highlights: Zoneless Angular architecture, Optimized rendering strategies, Dashboard analytics UI, API optimization & caching, Reusable enterprise components.

caseStudy.problem: Legacy pension system had critical performance bottlenecks — dashboard rendered 1,200+ records without virtualisation, causing 8-second load times on mid-range hardware used by administrators.
caseStudy.approach: Rebuilt the dashboard with Angular 21 Zoneless change detection, CDK virtual scroll for large datasets, and an API caching layer using RxJS shareReplay. Introduced reusable enterprise component library for consistent UI across 12 dashboard modules.
challenges: Migrating from Angular 14 zone-based to Angular 21 zoneless without breaking existing RBAC logic
Handling 50,000+ pension records with real-time filtering and sorting
Coordinating with legacy backend teams on API contract standardisation

grid.name: VNPF — Vanuatu National Provident Fund
grid.description: Cross-platform mobile application developed using Ionic Angular with biometric authentication and optimised mobile workflows.
grid.highlights: Android & iOS support, Face ID & Touch ID integration, Responsive mobile-first design, Low-bandwidth API optimisation, Hybrid mobile application architecture.

caseStudy.problem: Fund members in Vanuatu had no mobile access to their provident fund accounts. Manual branch visits were the only way to check balances, causing long queues and poor member experience, especially on outer islands with limited connectivity.
caseStudy.approach: Built a cross-platform Ionic Angular app (Android + iOS) with offline-capable data caching for low-bandwidth environments. Integrated Capacitor biometric plugin for Face ID / Touch ID authentication and optimised API payloads for 2G/3G conditions.
challenges: Implementing secure biometric authentication that degrades gracefully on older Android devices
Designing offline mode with reliable cache invalidation for balance data
App Store and Google Play submission and compliance review cycles

articles.title: Angular Signals vs RxJS: When to Use Each in Enterprise Apps
articles.excerpt: After migrating three enterprise Angular apps from zone-based RxJS patterns to Signals-first architecture, here's what I've learned about where each shines — and where mixing them is the right call.

articles.title: The Angular Performance Audit Checklist I Use on Every Project
articles.excerpt: A practical, battle-tested checklist for identifying and fixing the most common Angular performance bottlenecks — from change detection to bundle size to Core Web Vitals.

articles.title: Implementing Biometric Auth in Ionic Angular with Capacitor
articles.excerpt: A step-by-step guide to integrating Face ID and Touch ID in Ionic Angular apps using the Capacitor biometric plugin — including graceful fallback for older devices.

hero.title: Let's Build Something

steps.title: Initial Discussion
steps.desc: Let's discuss your role requirements, team structure, project goals, and expectations. No commitment required.

steps.title: Technical Assessment

steps.title: Onboarding

faqs.a: I'm currently freelancing, so I can start immediately or with the notice period agreed upon.
Open to remote, hybrid, or full-time on-site in Chennai, Hyderabad, Bengaluru, or any location. Remote is preferred but flexible.
Open to discussion based on role, location, and compensation package. Happy to discuss during the interview process.

faqs.q: Can you work across time zones?
faqs.a: Yes, I'm in IST (UTC+5:30) but comfortable working with teams across any time zone with reasonable overlap.

faqs.q: What types of roles interest you?
faqs.a: Senior Frontend Engineer, Angular Developer, Full Stack Engineer, or Technical Lead roles in enterprise, government, or product-based companies.
Yes, I'm active on GitHub and contribute to Angular and related projects. Happy to discuss ongoing contributions.

notAFit: Roles requiring relocation outside preferred locations without flexibility
Projects with no technical growth opportunity
